data.title: Polymarket Launches Market on Iran Military Action Timeline
data.description: Polymarket has introduced a new trading market focused on predicting the end of military action against Iran. According to NS3.AI, this market was launched at 4 AM today and has already seen a trading volume of $12,000. The platform allows participants to speculate on geopolitical events, providing insights into public sentiment and expectations regarding international conflicts. This initiative reflects the growing interest in using prediction markets to gauge potential outcomes in global affairs.

data.title: Aymium and Hanwa Plan New Biocarbon Facility in the U.S.
data.description: Aymium and Hanwa have signed a memorandum of understanding to develop a new biocarbon and biohydrogen facility in the United States. Bloomberg posted on X, the facility aims to support lower-carbon coal production in Japan. This collaboration marks a significant step towards enhancing sustainable energy solutions and reducing carbon emissions in industrial processes. The partnership underscores the growing emphasis on renewable energy sources and international cooperation in addressing climate change challenges.

data.title: Rwanda Considers Withdrawing Troops from Mozambique's Cabo Delgado Region
data.description: Rwanda has indicated the possibility of pulling its military forces from northern Mozambique. Bloomberg posted on X that these troops have been instrumental in stabilizing the Cabo Delgado area, which is crucial for $50 billion worth of natural gas projects. The potential withdrawal raises concerns about the security and future of these significant energy investments.

data.title: Former Financial Advisor Convicted for Defrauding NBA Players of $5 Million
data.description: A former financial advisor, previously associated with Morgan Stanley and Wells Fargo, has been found guilty of defrauding three NBA players out of $5 million. According to NS3.AI, prosecutors revealed that Daryl Cohen engaged in fraudulent activities by using marked-up life insurance policies and unauthorized transfers between 2017 and 2020 to finance his personal expenditures. The conviction highlights the risks athletes face when entrusting their finances to advisors.

data.title: Hong Kong Aims to Boost Flight Capacity Amid Travel Disruptions
data.description: Hong Kong authorities are collaborating with airlines to increase flight capacity and enhance the city's position as a transfer hub. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting efforts to leverage travel disruptions resulting from the Iran war. The initiative aims to strengthen Hong Kong's strategic role in global air travel by accommodating increased passenger and cargo traffic. This move is part of a broader strategy to ensure the city remains a key player in international aviation.

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs have seen inflows for five consecutive days, reaching a new high since 2026.
data.description: U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs saw inflows for five consecutive days, totaling approximately $767 million, marking the first time this year. This is the first time since 2026 that U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs have recorded five consecutive days of inflows, with approximately $767.32 million flowing in this week. These funds recorded a net inflow of $180.33 million on Friday, continuing the net inflow momentum that began earlier this week. The strongest day of this rally was Tuesday, when the spot Bitcoin ETF attracted $250.92 million in inflows. (Data from SoSoValue). The last time these funds experienced a similar streak of gains was in late November 2025, when the spot Bitcoin ETF saw five consecutive days of net inflows from November 25th to December 2nd, totaling $284.61 million. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: Global Oil Stockpile Release Expected to Impact Market Gradually
data.description: The largest-ever release from global oil stockpiles is anticipated to take time to influence the market, according to industry experts. Wall Street Journal (Markets) posted on X, highlighting that the gradual integration of these reserves into the oil market may not lead to immediate changes in oil prices or supply dynamics. Analysts suggest that while the release is significant, its effects will unfold over a longer period, potentially stabilizing prices and addressing supply concerns. The strategic release aims to mitigate disruptions and ensure a steady flow of oil, but the full impact will depend on various factors, including geopolitical developments and market responses.

data.title: Gulf Arab States to Reassess Strategies Post-Iran Conflict
data.description: Gulf Arab nations are set to reevaluate their strategies in the aftermath of the Iran conflict. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that these countries are considering changes in defense policies, regional alliances, and overseas investments. The reassessment also extends to their participation in global markets, as they navigate the new geopolitical landscape. This strategic shift reflects the broader implications of the conflict on the region's economic and political dynamics.

data.title: A new question has been listed on Polymarket: "When will the military action against Iran end?", with a current trading volume of $12,000.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, a new market called "When will the military operation against Iran end?" launched on Polymarket at 4:00 AM today, with a current trading volume of $12,000. A small amount of trading occurred in the "Military operation ends before March 31st" option, with a current probability of 17% for the "Yes" answer.

data.title: China's State Grid Boosts Investment in Power Grids to Support Growth
data.description: State Grid Corp. of China announced plans to accelerate investment in power grids. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting that this move aligns with Beijing's efforts to stabilize economic growth and increase infrastructure spending. The initiative is part of a broader strategy to enhance the country's energy infrastructure and support economic development.

data.title: Malaysia's Opposition Coalition to Be Led by Pan-Malaysian Islamic Party Member
data.description: Malaysia's opposition coalition has announced that a member of parliament from the Pan-Malaysian Islamic Party will lead the group. Bloomberg posted on X, this decision is expected to enhance the conservative party's influence in the country's political landscape. The Pan-Malaysian Islamic Party, known for its conservative stance, may leverage this leadership role to further its political agenda and disrupt the current political dynamics in Malaysia. This development comes amid ongoing political shifts in the nation, potentially impacting future governance and policy directions.

data.title: Blockchain Capital deposited 216,000 AAVE tokens, worth $24.8 million, into Coinbase Prime.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, Blockchain Capital deposited its remaining 216,292 AAVE tokens, worth $24.8 million, into Coinbase Prime. Additionally, a whale (0xFF5D) withdrew 10,008 AAVE tokens, worth $1.15 million, from Aave and deposited them into Binance.

data.title: Bitcoin Transfer Between Anonymous Addresses Observed
data.description: At 16:30, a transaction involving 218.7 BTC was recorded, according to ChainCatcher. The Bitcoin, valued at approximately $15.31 million, was moved from one anonymous address starting with 16o4pT to another address beginning with 18i3tV.

data.title: Akasa Air to Implement Fuel Surcharge Amid Rising Jet Fuel Prices
data.description: Akasa Air has announced plans to impose a fuel surcharge on both domestic and international flights due to a significant increase in jet fuel prices influenced by geopolitical tensions in the Middle East. According to Jin10, the surcharge will range from 199 to 1,300 Indian Rupees, depending on the route. The airline aims to offset the rising operational costs caused by the volatile fuel market. This move reflects broader industry challenges as airlines globally grapple with fluctuating fuel expenses.

data.title: Pump.fun: Launches tokenized agent auto-buyback feature
data.description: Pump.fun stated in a post on the X platform that on-chain agents are becoming dominant, and Pump.fun is building tools to accelerate the agent economy on its platform. The first step is to launch an automatic buyback feature for tokenized agents, a solution designed to bridge the gap between agent success and human chance; this feature is now live.

data.title: Sources familiar with the matter: Some oil loading operations at the port of Fujairah (UAE) outside the Strait of Hormuz have been suspended.
data.description: Sources familiar with the matter revealed that some oil loading operations at the port of Fujairah (in the UAE), outside the Strait of Hormuz, have been suspended following a drone attack that caused a fire on Saturday morning. (Jinshi)

data.title: Explosion Reported at Jewish School in Amsterdam
data.description: An explosion occurred at the exterior wall of a Jewish school in Amsterdam, as confirmed by the city's government on March 14. According to Jin10, the incident took place between the night of March 13 and the early hours of March 14. No casualties have been reported at this time.

data.title: Stanley Druckenmiller: Stablecoins could dominate global payments within 10 to 15 years
data.description: Billionaire Stanley Druckenmiller believes stablecoins could dominate global payments within 10 to 15 years. (Cointelegraph)

data.title: The WLFI governance staking system proposal has been approved.
data.description: The World Liberty Financial (WLFI) platform, a crypto project of the Trump family, has seen its WLFI governance staking system proposal pass with a 99.12% approval rate. The core objectives of the proposal include: 1. Encouraging active participation in WLFI governance; 2. Making staking a prerequisite for unlocking tokens for governance voting; 3. Rewarding participation in WLFI governance; 4. Creating a tiered node structure to incentivize long-term ecosystem participants, especially those who contribute the most to governance; and 5. Establishing mechanisms to prioritize collaborations with projects that actively support WLFI governance and the WLFI ecosystem.
